name: cross-doc-postal-discrepancy
rationale: Cross-doc postal discrepancy + standard refi at 50-75% LTV. F1.PC source-hierarchy captures both postal values with distinct source classifications (loan_app T6R 2K8 vs appraisal T6R 2K9); F4.PC injectPostalCodeDiscrepancyCallout fires. Interaction: F1.PC source-tuple capture + F4.PC callout text injection both happen. Distinct from A22 (F1.PC focus only) and D04 (F4.PC focus only) — F06 tests both simultaneously.
notes: Single-event sequence. Three-scenario interaction triangle: A22 (F1.PC) + D04 (F4.PC) + F06 (both).
